sourceMode.title: Data Source Mode
sourceMode.description: Choose between dynamic search discovery or processing a fixed seed file.

keyword.title: Search Query / Patent Topic
keyword.description: Enter infrared wavebands, material types, patent concepts, or specific applications.

searchDomain.title: Source Domain / Target Entity
searchDomain.description: Restrict search to a specific assignee, platform, or research source.

countryFilter.title: Target Country / Jurisdiction
countryFilter.description: Filter findings to specific jurisdictions or countries.

maxItems.title: Max Listings to Discover
maxItems.description: Keep low, 5 to 20, for initial tests.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI API key. Do not share this key in screenshots or chat.

outputKvKey.title: Output CSV File Name
outputKvKey.description: The enriched CSV output file name.

batchSize.title: Batch Processing Limit
batchSize.description: Number of records to process in one run.

startRow.title: Starting Row Offset
startRow.description: Starting row number for resuming a batch run.
